texts.label: text
texts.orig: We wish to take this opportunity to thank you and your company for the interest and business support to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort. In this respect we are pleased to offer the following comprehensive 2024 rates applicable to your Company.
texts.text: We wish to take this opportunity to thank you and your company for the interest and business support to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort. In this respect we are pleased to offer the following comprehensive 2024 rates applicable to your Company.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMS AND CONDITIONS
texts.text: TERMS AND CONDITIONS

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 1.RESERVATION STATUS
texts.text: 1.RESERVATION STATUS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations will be honored with a voucher, an LPO or supporting  document  on  official  letterhead  bearing  the authorized signature advised to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort as set out in the Schedule hereto.  Save for manifest fraud, anything appearing to have been signed by the authorized signatory shall bind the Company. Any change of signatories should be notified to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort and will  take  effect  from  the  time  it  is  received  by  Lake Bogoria Spa Resort. The exact taken up reservations by the  Company  along  with  the  rooming  list  should  be received by Lake Bogoria Spa Resort's sales/ reservations office prior to arrival of guests at Lake Bogoria Spa Resort.
texts.text: Reservations will be honored with a voucher, an LPO or supporting  document  on  official  letterhead  bearing  the authorized signature advised to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort as set out in the Schedule hereto.  Save for manifest fraud, anything appearing to have been signed by the authorized signatory shall bind the Company. Any change of signatories should be notified to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort and will  take  effect  from  the  time  it  is  received  by  Lake Bogoria Spa Resort. The exact taken up reservations by the  Company  along  with  the  rooming  list  should  be received by Lake Bogoria Spa Resort's sales/ reservations office prior to arrival of guests at Lake Bogoria Spa Resort.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2. RELEASE PERIOD AND CANCELLATION
texts.text: 2. RELEASE PERIOD AND CANCELLATION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cancellations  should  be  notified  to  Lake  Bogoria  Spa Resort's sales/reservations office verbally and followed by written notice of cancellation. Cancellation will be effective on  the  working  day  on  which  Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Resort receives the written notice. Any reservations received after 5.00pm will be deemed to be received on the next working day. Reservations that are cancelled, reduced in length of stay or reduced in numbers are subject to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort's prevailing Cancellation and No -Show Fees which are currently as follows:
texts.text: Cancellations  should  be  notified  to  Lake  Bogoria  Spa Resort's sales/reservations office verbally and followed by written notice of cancellation. Cancellation will be effective on  the  working  day  on  which  Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Resort receives the written notice. Any reservations received after 5.00pm will be deemed to be received on the next working day. Reservations that are cancelled, reduced in length of stay or reduced in numbers are subject to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort's prevailing Cancellation and No -Show Fees which are currently as follows:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 0 -7 days, 100% of entire stay 8 -14 days, 50% of entire stay 15 -35 days, 25% of entire stay No show: 100% of entire stay
texts.text: 0 -7 days, 100% of entire stay 8 -14 days, 50% of entire stay 15 -35 days, 25% of entire stay No show: 100% of entire stay

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The number of days refers to the number of clear days between the cancellation date and the anticipated date of arrival of the guest (excluding the cancellation date and the date of arrival).
texts.text: The number of days refers to the number of clear days between the cancellation date and the anticipated date of arrival of the guest (excluding the cancellation date and the date of arrival).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake Bogoria Spa Resort may cancel reservations in any of the following events: If the Company fails to pay the deposit within 7 days of the due date; or will not be  able to honor  its obligations
texts.text: Lake Bogoria Spa Resort may cancel reservations in any of the following events: If the Company fails to pay the deposit within 7 days of the due date; or will not be  able to honor  its obligations

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If  Lake Bogoria Spa Resort reasonably believes that the Company's financial  situation  is  such  that  the  Company under  this agreement
texts.text: If  Lake Bogoria Spa Resort reasonably believes that the Company's financial  situation  is  such  that  the  Company under  this agreement

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 3. DEPOSIT POLICY
texts.text: 3. DEPOSIT POLICY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Advance  deposits  where  required  by  Lake  Bogoria  Spa Resort are calculated on the total value of the booking and
texts.text: Advance  deposits  where  required  by  Lake  Bogoria  Spa Resort are calculated on the total value of the booking and

texts.label: text
texts.orig: are payable as follows: 50% due if booking is made 8 -14 days prior to arrival 100% due if booking is made 0 hrs. - 7 days prior to arrival
texts.text: are payable as follows: 50% due if booking is made 8 -14 days prior to arrival 100% due if booking is made 0 hrs. - 7 days prior to arrival

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In  the  event  that  the  Company  fails  to  pay  the  deposit within 7 days of the due date (where bookings are made 8-14  days  prior  to  arrival)  or  within  24  hours  (where bookings are made 48hrs -7 days prior to arrival) (as the case  may  be),  Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Resort  may  treat  the reservation as cancelled by the Company.
texts.text: In  the  event  that  the  Company  fails  to  pay  the  deposit within 7 days of the due date (where bookings are made 8-14  days  prior  to  arrival)  or  within  24  hours  (where bookings are made 48hrs -7 days prior to arrival) (as the case  may  be),  Lake  Bogoria  Spa  Resort  may  treat  the reservation as cancelled by the Company.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 4. RESERVATION GUARANTEES
texts.text: 4. RESERVATION GUARANTEES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations  must  be  guaranteed  by  means  of  cash, cheque, credit card or inter-bank transfer in such amount as required by Lake Bogoria Spa Resort from time to time and in any event not being less than the cost of one night's rate for the type of room reserved. Non-guaranteed reservations are subject to release by Lake Bogoria Spa Resort at 18:00hrs on the day of expected arrival.
texts.text: Reservations  must  be  guaranteed  by  means  of  cash, cheque, credit card or inter-bank transfer in such amount as required by Lake Bogoria Spa Resort from time to time and in any event not being less than the cost of one night's rate for the type of room reserved. Non-guaranteed reservations are subject to release by Lake Bogoria Spa Resort at 18:00hrs on the day of expected arrival.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 5. RATE CONFIDENTIALITY
texts.text: 5. RATE CONFIDENTIALITY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  agreed  company  rates  are  only  valid  for  bona  fide associates of the Company and may not be revealed to, or used to  book  for,  third  parties  other  than  in  accordance with the provisions of this clause. The rates agreed here must not be displayed directly over the internet or on third party websites but may be packaged together with airfare and/or other arrangements so that the Lake Bogoria Spa Resort rates herein are not transparent.
texts.text: The  agreed  company  rates  are  only  valid  for  bona  fide associates of the Company and may not be revealed to, or used to  book  for,  third  parties  other  than  in  accordance with the provisions of this clause. The rates agreed here must not be displayed directly over the internet or on third party websites but may be packaged together with airfare and/or other arrangements so that the Lake Bogoria Spa Resort rates herein are not transparent.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 6.  CHILDREN
texts.text: 6.  CHILDREN

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A child in a baby cot (up 4 years old) sharing a room with an adult can stay free of charge. Children under 13 years staying in a separate room will be charged at seventy five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate & 45% of single for a child sharing a room with adult/s.
texts.text: A child in a baby cot (up 4 years old) sharing a room with an adult can stay free of charge. Children under 13 years staying in a separate room will be charged at seventy five percent (75%) of the applicable room rate & 45% of single for a child sharing a room with adult/s.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7. ARRIVAL AND CHECKOUT TIMES
texts.text: 7. ARRIVAL AND CHECKOUT TIMES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rooms are available for new arrivals from 12.00hrs on the scheduled  arrival  date.  Check  out  time  on  the  day  of departure is 10.00hrs. Pre-booking is encouraged for early arrivals to guarantee rooms upon arrival and a prebooking will be subject to a full overnight rate.
texts.text: Rooms are available for new arrivals from 12.00hrs on the scheduled  arrival  date.  Check  out  time  on  the  day  of departure is 10.00hrs. Pre-booking is encouraged for early arrivals to guarantee rooms upon arrival and a prebooking will be subject to a full overnight rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 8.  DAY ROOM
texts.text: 8.  DAY ROOM

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Day room rate (subject to room availability) is at 75% of applicable  rates.  Check  out  time  for  day  room  use  is 18:00hrs.  Check-out  after  18:00hrs  is  subject  to  the  full room rate.
texts.text: Day room rate (subject to room availability) is at 75% of applicable  rates.  Check  out  time  for  day  room  use  is 18:00hrs.  Check-out  after  18:00hrs  is  subject  to  the  full room rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 9.  COMPLIMENTARY ROOMS
texts.text: 9.  COMPLIMENTARY ROOMS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake Bogoria Spa Resort will subject to the availability of rooms  grant  matching  complimentary  rooms/  guests  as follows
texts.text: Lake Bogoria Spa Resort will subject to the availability of rooms  grant  matching  complimentary  rooms/  guests  as follows

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Each 15 paying guests in a group the 16 th  person is free to a maximum of 1 single rooms.
texts.text: Each 15 paying guests in a group the 16 th  person is free to a maximum of 1 single rooms.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 10. GOVERNMENT TAXES
texts.text: 10. GOVERNMENT TAXES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake Bogoria Spa Resort's rates include statutory taxes, levies and service charges. In the event that the Government of Kenya adjusts the prevailing or institutes a new tax regime during the duration of this agreement, Lake Bogoria Spa Resort reserves the right to adjust the rates contained in this agreement accordingly.
texts.text: Lake Bogoria Spa Resort's rates include statutory taxes, levies and service charges. In the event that the Government of Kenya adjusts the prevailing or institutes a new tax regime during the duration of this agreement, Lake Bogoria Spa Resort reserves the right to adjust the rates contained in this agreement accordingly.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 11. PAYMENTS
texts.text: 11. PAYMENTS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Unless the Company has credit facilities with Lake Bogoria Spa Resort, the Company is required, subject to clause 3 above, to make full payment prior to arrival, failure to which Lake Bogoria Spa Resort reserves the right to treat  the reservation as cancelled. We currently accept the following credit  cards:  Visa,  Master  Card,  American  Express  and Diners International. Cheque payments will be accepted only if cleared in advance of arrival. Should payment not be cleared by the bank before guest arrival, Lake Bogoria Spa Resort reserves the right to request cash payment
texts.text: Unless the Company has credit facilities with Lake Bogoria Spa Resort, the Company is required, subject to clause 3 above, to make full payment prior to arrival, failure to which Lake Bogoria Spa Resort reserves the right to treat  the reservation as cancelled. We currently accept the following credit  cards:  Visa,  Master  Card,  American  Express  and Diners International. Cheque payments will be accepted only if cleared in advance of arrival. Should payment not be cleared by the bank before guest arrival, Lake Bogoria Spa Resort reserves the right to request cash payment

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 12. CREDIT FACILITIES Credit  facilities  may  be  extended  to  the  Company  upon meeting Lake Bogoria Spa Resort's requirements for such facilities.  Where  such  facilities  have  been  extended,  the Company  will,  subject  to  the  credit  approval  terms,  be permitted make reservations with  a voucher, an LPO or letter  of  commitment  bearing  the  authorized  signature, received prior to any arrival.  Subject to Lake Bogoria Spa Resort's prevailing credit policy from time to time, invoices shall be raised in the nominated currency, weekly, monthly or at the end of guest stay at Lake Bogoria Spa Resort. On any  account  where  details  of  payment  have  not  been specified,  payment  terms  will  be  applied  in  accordance with this agreement terms.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 14. DISPUTES Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Lake Bogoria Spa Resort's finance department within seven (7 ) days of the invoice date, failure to which the Company will be liable for the full invoice. The dispute will be considered and the Company notified of Lake Bogoria Spa Resort's determination of the disputed amount. On determination of the disputed amount, only the amount in dispute may be adjusted  on  the  invoice  and  payment  will  be  due  within seven  (7)  days  of  the  adjusted  invoice.    It  is  expressly agreed  and  declared  that  any  disputes,  action  or  other matters arising hereunder shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya. : Kabarnet Account Number: 1390283150170 Swift Code: EQBLKENA Currency: Kshs USD Account Account name:    Lake Bogoria Spa Resort LTD Bank Name:        Equity Bank (Kenya) LTD Branch Name:     Kabarnet Account No:        1390283150687 SWIFT Code:      EQBLKENA

texts.orig: 15. DEFAULT Without  prejudice  to  any  other  rights  available  to  Lake Bogoria Spa Resort, in the event of default in payment of undisputed invoices and resolved invoices, Lake Bogoria Spa  Resort  reserves  the  right  to  refuse  the  Company's clients  admission  into  and  use  of  Lake  Bogoria  Spa Resort's  facilities  until  payment  is  made  in  full.    Rates quoted in this agreement are subject to the Company not defaulting  as  against  the  agreed  schedule  of  making payments. texts.orig: 18. SUSPENSION OF OBLIGATIONS Lake Bogoria Spa Resort shall not be held responsible in the event, and to the extent, that the performance of this agreement is delayed or prevented by any cause beyond its control, including 'Acts of God' and circumstances not due to its fault or negligence. In such circumstances Lake Bogoria  Spa  Resort  shall  be  relieved  of  its  obligations under this agreement.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 19. CANCELLATION OF AGREEMENT Lake Bogoria Spa Resort reserves the right at any time, by giving notice in writing, to cancel this Agreement should the Company fail to fulfill the above terms and conditions. Upon  such  cancellation  all  sums  outstanding  from  the Company shall be immediately due and payable.

Upon  such  cancellation  all  sums  outstanding  from  the Company shall be immediately due and payable.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are confident that the tranquility of our facilities and numerous recreational activities will provide your guests with the perfect environment to relax and unwind, however our greatest amenity is the personalized  service  your  guest  will  receive.    This  agreement  is  issued  in  two  copies  and  the company is kindly requested to sign, date, initial all pages, stamp both copies and return one copy to our office. The agreement will only become effective upon receipt of the completed signed copy.
